extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: all “By” rows are nil and excluded; the “Against the Company” row has 23 tax proceedings and INR 52.40 million, the “Against the Directors” row has 4 tax proceedings and INR 0.24 million, the “Against the Promoter” row has 7 tax proceedings and INR 38.85 million, while subsidiaries are nil; the separate Promoter Group entry shows 1 criminal proceeding. Accordingly, criminal proceedings against all listed entities are counted as 1, regulatory proceedings are 0, and tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries are 23; the quantified aggregate against the company and subsidiaries is only INR 52.40 million, excluding promoter/director matters and all “By” rows. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹50.49 million as at September 30, 2022, rather than a re-sum; both monetary tables use million, converted to crore by dividing by 10, giving 5.24 crore for litigation and 5.049 crore for contingent liabilities. The customer concentration disclosure is company-wide and states top-10 customers as a percentage of revenues for Fiscal 2020, 2021, Fiscal 2022 and the period ended September 30, 2022; the most recent full fiscal year is Fiscal 2022 at 82.77%, while no top-5 figure is disclosed. The auditor disclosure describes emphasis of matter only, not a modified opinion, and no material going-concern uncertainty is mentioned.
